zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hurst II於1460年12月30日出生在英國素瑞素瓦可 可利斯丘其時，他的父親John Hurst41歲，母親Ann Hurst50歲。他於1479年與Lady Mary Heston在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1479年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾被列為tailor。他去世於1530年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾奧可福德享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Hurst II于1460年12月30日出生在英国素瑞素瓦可 可利斯丘其时，他的父亲John Hurst41岁，母亲Ann Hurst50岁。他于1479年与Lady Mary Heston在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1479年在英国英格兰奧可福爾被列为tailor。他去世于1530年在英国英格兰奧可福爾奧可福德享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hurst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): topographic name for someone who lived near a wood or wooded hill, from Middle English hirst(e), herst(e), hurst(e) (Old English hyrst) or a habitational name from any of the places so called, such as Hurst Green (in Mitton, Lancashire), Hirst (Northumberland), Hurst (Berkshire, Kent, Warwickshire), Hurstpierpoint (Sussex), or Hirst in Longwood (Yorkshire).
Irish: re-Anglicized form of de Horsaigh, the Gaelicized form of the English habitational name Horsey , established in Ireland since the 13th century.
German and Swiss German (also Hürst): topographic name from Middle High German hurst ‘woodland, thicket’; or a habitational name from a place so named in Westphalia.

variants.name: Herst
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name or nickname from Polish herszt ‘ringleader, chieftain’.

variants.name: Horsey
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from Horsey Pignes (Somerset), Horse Eye (Sussex), or Horsey (Norfolk), from Old English hors ‘horse’ + ēg ‘island, low-lying land’.

variants.name: Hearst
meanings: Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname such as   Hirsch  .

variants.name: Horst
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Phares, Alois, Armin, Fritz, Hans, Inge, Manfred, Monika, Reinhold.

North German and Dutch: topographic name from Middle Low German hurst, Middle Dutch horst ‘undergrowth, brushwood, wild place’. More specifically, the term was also used to denote a crow's or similar large bird's nest, a raised area in surrounding marshland, or an area of uncleared woodland, all of which meanings could have contributed to the surname. This surname is also a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. Compare Hurst .

History: As a name of German origin (see 1 above) the surname Horst is established among the American Mennonites. Their progenitors were the brothers Joseph, Michael, and Peter Horst, who came to PA in 1731 together with their widowed mother. Among their descendants the altered form Hurst is also found.

variants.name: Hirst
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hurst  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hurst II was born on 30 December 1460, in Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, England, his father, John Hurst, was 41 and his mother, Ann Hurst, was 50. He married Lady Mary Heston in 1479, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. In 1479, at the age of 21, his occupation is listed as tailor in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1530, in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hurst II est né le 30 décembre 1460, à Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, John Hurst, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Ann Hurst, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary Heston en 1479, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. En 1479, à l’âge de 21 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est tailor à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1530, à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Hurst II am 30. Dezember 1460 in Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hurst 41 und seine Mutter Ann Hurst 50. Er hat 1479 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Mary Heston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1479, als er 21 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als tailor in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1530 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hurst II è nato il il 30 dicembre 1460 nel Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, England, il suo padre, John Hurst, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Ann Hurst, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary Heston nel 1479, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1479, all'età di 21 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come tailor nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1530, nel Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hurst IIが1460年12月30日にイギリススリーソウスワーク チリストチャーチで生まれた時，父John Hurstは41歳，母Ann Hurstは50歳であった。1479年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでLady Mary Hestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1479年，21歳の時，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでの職業はtailorと記録されている。彼は1530年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hurst II(이)가 1460년 12월 30일 영국 수리 소우스워크 크리스트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hurst(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Hurst(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Lady Mary Heston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1479년, 21세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 tailor이었다. 그는 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hurst II nasceu em 30 de dezembro de 1460, em Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hurst, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Ann Hurst, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Heston em 1479, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1479, com 21 anos, sua profissão aparece como tailor em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1530, em Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hurst II родился 30 декабря 1460 г. в местности соутварк крисчурч, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени John Hurst было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Ann Hurst, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Heston в 1479 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1479 году, в возрасте 21 год,  он работал по профессии tailor в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1530 г. в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Hurst II nació el 30 de diciembre de 1460, en Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hurst, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Ann Hurst, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Lady Mary Heston en 1479, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. En 1479, a la edad de 21 años, su ocupación registrada era tailor en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1530, en Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
